exams.name: JEE Main 2026
exams.description: National level engineering entrance exam for NITs, IIITs and GFTIs.

exams.name: JEE Advanced 2026
exams.description: Gateway to IITs. Only top 2.5 lakh JEE Main qualifiers are eligible.

exams.name: NEET-UG 2026
exams.description: National medical entrance for MBBS/BDS in government and private colleges.

exams.name: PGCET 2026
exams.description: Postgraduate Common Entrance Test for M.Tech/MCA seats in Karnataka.

exams.name: VITEEE 2026
exams.description: Admission to B.Tech programs at VIT campuses.

exams.name: NDA & NA (I) 2026
exams.description: National Defence Academy & Naval Academy Examination.

exams.name: IISER Aptitude Test 2026
exams.description: Admission to BS-MS dual degree programs at IISERs.

exams.name: NEST 2026
exams.description: National Entrance Screening Test for NISER and CEBS.

exams.name: MHT CET 2026
exams.description: Maharashtra Common Entrance Test for admission to B.E./B.Tech, B.Pharm and Pharm.D courses in Maharashtra colleges.

exams.name: COMEDK UGET 2026
exams.conductedBy: COMEDK (Consortium of Medical, Engineering & Dental Colleges of Karnataka)
exams.description: Consortium of Medical, Engineering & Dental Colleges of Karnataka UGET. Provides admission to 190+ private engineering colleges in Karnataka.

exams.name: BITSAT 2026
exams.description: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Admission Test.

exams.name: JIPMER Nursing 2026
exams.description: JIPMER Entrance for nursing and paramedical programs.
